_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of secure software deployment methodologies, tools, and practices.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time serving, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, and shadow deployments, and the infrastructure requirements and failure modes of each.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-023 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-008 (TF, cosine: 0.537), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.512).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.574). Shared vocabulary: [deployment, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [methodologies, practices, secure, software, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, batch, canary, deployments, edge, failure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.916, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.068 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of secure software deployment methodologies, tools, and practices." and "Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.580 ≈ STS 0.574 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [deployment, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [deployment, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [methodologies, practices, secure, software, tools]. WIDAI-only: [b, batch, canary, deployments, edge, failure].
